elements.title: Bosco Nordio nature reserve
elements.contents: ... that the Bosco Nordio nature reserve (pictured) is located on dunes built up by four millennia of deposits by nearby rivers?

elements.title: yum yum sauce
elements.contents: ... that yum yum sauce is sometimes called "white sauce" or "shrimp sauce", although it is neither white nor contains shrimp?

elements.title: Meiō incident
elements.contents: ... that the Meiō incident deposed a shogun?

elements.title: was set on fire and beaten to death
elements.contents: ... that Dipu Chandra Das, a garment factory worker, was set on fire and beaten to death after being accused of insulting the Islamic prophet Muhammad?

elements.title: Lewis Hancox
elements.contents: ... that pages of Lewis Hancox's graphic novel were displayed in The Cartoon Museum of London?

elements.title: Jack Strand
elements.contents: ... that college football quarterback Jack Strand threw for over 7 miles (11 km) in his career?

elements.title: Zirconic
elements.contents: ... that Zirconic was a U.S. government effort to create reconnaissance satellites equipped with stealth technology?

elements.title: Royal Societies Club
elements.contents: ... that Siegfried Sassoon referred to the Royal Societies Club as the "United Nonentities Club"?

elements.title: Walter Deverell
elements.contents: ... that the only painting Walter Deverell ever sold, A Pet, was bought by William Holman Hunt and John Everett Millais as an "act of charity"?
